mapper.select: SELECT dp.id AS placeId, dc.short_name AS comShortName, dc.full_name AS comFullName, dp.code AS placeCode, dp.run, dp.`open`, dp.old_version, dp.used, COALESCE(dp.url, '#') AS url, dp.short_name AS placeShortName FROM dain_place dp JOIN dain_company dc ON dc.id = dp.company_id WHERE dp.used = true AND code != 'management' ORDER BY dp.short_name
SELECT code FROM dain_logger WHERE place_id = #{placeId} AND used = true ORDER BY code ASC

SELECT dl.id AS loggerId, dl.place_id, dl.code AS loggerCode, dl.name AS loggerName, dl.cdma_no, dl.install_dt, dl.uploaded_at, dl.cycle_check, dc.id AS pcId, dc.name AS pcName FROM dain_logger dl JOIN dain_computer dc ON dc.id = dl.computer_id WHERE dl.code = #{loggerCode} AND dl.used = true
mapper.update: UPDATE dain_logger SET name = #{params.name}, install_dt = #{params.install_dt}, cdma_no = #{params.cdma_no}, computer_id = #{params.computer_id} WHERE code = #{params.code}
UPDATE dain_place SET open = #{params.open} WHERE id = #{params.id};
mapper.select: SELECT dp.short_name AS '현장명', dl.name AS '구분명', dl.code AS '로거명', dl.cdma_no AS 'CDMA NO', dl.install_dt AS '최초측정일', dc.name AS '수집 PC', CASE WHEN dl.used = true THEN '운영' ELSE '종료' END AS '운영상태' FROM dain_logger dl JOIN dain_place dp ON dp.id = dl.place_id JOIN dain_computer dc ON dc.id = dl.computer_id ORDER BY dl.used DESC, dp.short_name, dl.code

SELECT ds.id AS sensorId ,ds.code AS sensorCode ,dp.code AS placeCode ,dl.cycle_check AS cycle FROM dain_sensor ds JOIN dain_place dp ON dp.id = ds.place_id JOIN dain_sensor_type dst ON dst.id = ds.sensor_type_id JOIN dain_logger dl ON dl.id = ds.logger_id WHERE ds.logger_id = #{params.loggerId} AND ds.used = true AND dst.id NOT IN (5, 6) ORDER BY ds.name
SELECT DATE(measured_at) AS date ,ROUND(AVG(raw_val), 3) AS raw FROM data_${params.placeCode} WHERE sensor_id = #{params.sensorId} AND raw_val != 0 AND used = true GROUP BY date ORDER BY date;

SELECT SUM(raw_val != 0) AS total_success, SUM(raw_val = 0) AS total_fail, SUM( (measured_at >= CURDATE()) AND (measured_at < CURDATE() + INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND (raw_val != 0) ) AS today_success, SUM( (measured_at >= CURDATE()) AND (measured_at < CURDATE() + INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND (raw_val = 0) ) AS today_fail FROM data_${params.placeCode} WHERE sensor_id = #{params.sensorId}

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(measured_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS measured ,raw_val AS raw ,'실패' AS status FROM data_${params.placeCode} WHERE sensor_id = #{params.sensorId} AND raw_val = 0 ORDER BY measured_at DESC
